summary: Tighten cache, store, and config directory/file modes to owner-only (0o700 / 0o600).
reason: writeCache used 0o644/0o755, so cached Amazon response bodies (full order history, items, addresses, payments) were world-readable on shared hosts (CI runners, multi-user dev boxes, Docker images with multiple UIDs). Same defect existed in store.OpenWithContext and config.save().
